text:
Barbosa is a member of the Survey Corps working under Makō Messer's command who appears in the story Bahamut.

Appearance

Barbosa is a tall woman who has a muscular silhouette. She has fair hair tied in two braids.

Story

Along with her squad, she is seen fighting a group of Titans then confirms being alive afterwards. Later on, they come across Bertolt Weill and a Titan. The captain Messer injures the Titan, making it run away, then the squad arrests Bertolt for treason.
